news.headline: Thailand regulator OKs USDT, USDC stablecoins for trading on regulated exchanges. Stablecoins worth $230B in circulation.
news.summary: Thailand's SEC has approved Tether's USDt and Circle's USDC for trading, following regulatory changes that took effect on March 16. These stablecoins join a limited list of approved cryptocurrencies in the country. Stablecoins are gaining popularity as a cheaper and faster alternative for remittances, with a16z Crypto reporting 28.5 million unique users and 600 million transactions in December alone. In emerging markets like Sub-Saharan Africa, stablecoins are 60% cheaper for remittances than traditional methods. The circulating supply of stablecoins is nearly $230 billion, with Tether's USDt accounting for over 63% of the market.

news.headline: Pedalheads Swim opens new location at Fremont Village in Port Coquitlam. Offers swim lessons to kids aged 4 months to 12 years. #PoolAccess
news.summary: Pedalheads Swim, a well-known provider of children’s swim lessons, is excited to unveil its modern facility in Port Coquitlam, British Columbia. Set to open in April at Fremont Village, the new center will cater to families in the Tri-Cities region seeking top-notch swim instruction for kids aged 4 months to 12 years. This initiative aims to combat the local pool shortage and increase access to swimming education. The facility, situated at Unit 160, is equipped to provide stress-free and high-quality lessons.

news.headline: Lila Sciences harnesses A.I. for breakthrough scientific advancements, paving way for limitless possibilities.
news.summary: A promising new company symbolizes a renewed hope that artificial intelligence can greatly enhance scientific breakthroughs.

news.headline: Ny Fed: Expectations financial situation to worsen year from now, the highest since November 2023.
Ny Fed: Public expects bigger future price increases for gas, rent and food.
Keysight creates isolated probing tech for fast-switching power device testing at APEC 2025, booth #829.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has unveiled a new optically isolated differential probing line aimed at improving the testing of high-speed devices like wide bandgap GaN and SiC semiconductors. These voltage probes will debut at the Applied Power Electronics Conference (APEC) 2025, showcased in Keysight’s booth (#829) alongside the MXR B and HD3 series of oscilloscopes. The probes are designed to enhance efficiency and performance when validating floating half-bridge and full-bridge converters.

news.headline: Rigaku Corporation wins Diana Nyyssonen Memorial Best Paper Award for 3D flash memory defect inspection method.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Rigaku Corporation, a subsidiary of Rigaku Holdings Corporation, has been honored with the Diana Nyyssonen Memorial Best Paper Award for their innovative non-destructive technique to identify defects in 3D flash memory. The method utilizes an ultra-high-resolution X-ray microscope. This prestigious award recognizes outstanding contributions in the field, and the winning team excelled in delivering groundbreaking inspection and measurement technology. Rigaku, led by CEO Jun Kawakami, continues to push boundaries in the industry with their cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Heidi Klum partners with PosheEra for new electronic hair removal device, aiming to revolutionize at-home hair removal.
news.summary: Recently unveiled in Los Angeles, PosheEra is a cutting-edge electronic hair removal device primed to transform the at-home hair removal industry. Teaming up with renowned Supermodel and TV Personality Heidi Klum, the device aims to offer a seamless and enjoyable self-care routine. The collaboration between PosheEra and Heidi Klum is set to reshape traditional hair removal methods, promising an innovative approach to achieving smooth skin. The partnership is poised to make waves in the beauty industry, with the device's multifunctionality and advanced features positioning it as a game-changer.

news.headline: Movement Network Foundation launches Public Mainnet Beta with $250M+ Total Value Locked in liquidity to fuel Move blockchain network.
news.summary: The Movement Network Foundation, based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands, revealed on March 10, 2025, the successful launch of Movement Public on the Move blockchain network. This launch was enabled by cutting-edge day-one liquidity strategies. The foundation is committed to enhancing MoveVM technology.

news.headline: Knox Lane buys majority stake in HighGround Restoration Group, positioning for growth and expansion.
news.summary: San Francisco and Irving, Texas - On March 10, 2025, Knox Lane, an investment firm focused on growth, disclosed its purchase of a majority share in HighGround Restoration Group, Inc. in a move aimed at propelling the company towards leading growth and expansion in the industry. The acquisition signifies a strategic decision by Knox Lane to position HighGround for enhanced market presence and development.

news.headline: CLEW launches Sepsis Virtual Unit to boost SEP-1 compliance and patient outcomes, using AI surveillance solutions.
news.summary: In Boston on March 10, 2025, CLEW, a prominent company specializing in AI-based clinical surveillance solutions, revealed the introduction of their Sepsis Virtual Unit (SVU). This innovative tool is aimed at assisting healthcare facilities in enhancing sepsis identification, boosting SEP-1 compliance, and ultimately improving patient outcomes.

news.headline: Uthana secures $4.3M funding to revolutionize 3D character animation with generative AI.
news.summary: A Los Angeles-based company, Uthana, revealed on March 10, 2025, that they have secured $4.3 million in funding through a recent investment round. The leading investor in this funding round was IA Ventures, and other participants included A16Z Speedrun, Acequia Capital, Cursor Capital, HustleFund, and MetaVision. This successful funding round highlights the strong support and interest in Uthana's generative AI technology.

news.headline: Skyline Roofing Partners, with Imperial Capital's backing, acquires residential roofing companies Classic Roofing & Construction and John Hogan Roofing on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Atlanta, Skyline Roofing Partners, supported by Imperial Capital, announced its ongoing strategic growth by purchasing two prominent residential roofing companies. Classic Roofing & Construction and John Hogan Roofing have now been acquired as part of Skyline's expansion plan.

news.headline: IPv4.Global introduces lending program using IP addresses as collateral. A first-of-its-kind loan facility.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in New York, IPv4.Global revealed a groundbreaking development in the form of a unique loan facility supported by the borrower's IPv4 addresses serving as collateral. This initiative marks a significant progression for the company, known as the leading and most reliable IPv4 marketplace worldwide. This innovative offering sets a new standard in utilizing IPv4 resources and signifies a crucial shift in the industry.

news.headline: Regulations struggle to keep up with tech advancements like AI and Web3. A comprehensive, proactive approach may be needed. #EmergingTechnologyReform
news.summary: Technology is advancing rapidly, surpassing Moore's law as computational power doubles every six months instead of every two years. The EU Artificial Intelligence Act, which came into force in August 2024, is already struggling to keep up with emerging technologies like AI agents and generative AI. Technology regulations are fragmented, making compliance challenging for businesses and users. A comprehensive regulation approach is suggested to address the integration of multiple technologies and their individual regulations. Responsible innovation principles should guide technology regulations, with a proposed "Truth in Technology Act" aimed at ensuring safety, security, ethics, and transparency in technology development. Collaboration on global regulations is deemed necessary to incentivize value-creating innovation while limiting destructive outcomes. An international, evergreen regulation like the proposed Truth in Technology Act could be crucial for the future of technology. Character count: 697.

news.headline: Viking M&A expands to Baltimore, 16th office; offers top-tier advisory to local business owners in Maryland.
news.summary: Viking M&A is broadening its reach into the Baltimore metro area and beyond, as of March 10, 2025. Entrepreneurs in Baltimore and throughout Maryland now have access to top-tier M&A services with the launch of Viking Mergers & Acquisitions’ latest office. This expansion marks the sixteenth office for Viking M&A, providing businesses in the region with unparalleled expertise in mergers and acquisitions.

news.headline: TCI Biotech's 2024 fiscal year ends strong with global growth plans for 2025 after a steady revenue increase.
news.summary: In Taipei on March 10, 2025, TCI Biotech (known as TCI Co., Ltd.) and listed on TWSE as 8436, a top CDMO+ player in health food and skincare biotech, disclosed its consolidated financial performance for the fiscal year closing on December 31, 2024. The company unveiled a consistent revenue growth trend...

news.headline: Inventor from San Diego creates electronic street sign for public info. (SBT-1943) - Mar 10, 2025 - Pittsburgh - PRNewswire
news.summary: A San Diego, California inventor unveiled a new electronic system designed to notify the public about parking restrictions, storm warnings, accidents, and detours for specific roads or areas. The system, named REMOTE, aims to improve communication during various situations. This invention comes at a time when the demand for efficient information sharing is on the rise.

news.headline: 70mai introduces 4K Omni: 360° Dash Cam for ultimate protection in driving scenarios, equipped with dual-channel recording.
news.summary: 70mai, one of the top players in dash cam technology, has unveiled the 70mai 4K Omni on March 10, 2025. This cutting-edge device serves as an enhancement to the pioneering 360° rotating dash cam, offering complete safeguarding in all driving situations. Boasting dual-channel recording capabilities, the 70mai 4K Omni marks a significant stride in providing advanced features to users for enhanced protection on the road.

Ny Fed: February expected spending growth accelerated.
Ny Fed: Expected probability of missing debt payment highest since April 2020.
Vanco integrates with Planning Center, streamlining gift processing for churches, enhancing efficiency and saving time.
news.summary: In Bloomington, Minnesota, Vanco has announced an exciting new integration with Planning Center that aims to enhance the efficiency of gift and donation processing for churches. This collaboration is expected to save significant time and increase productivity.

Ny Fed: February Three-Year ahead expected inflation unchanged at 3%.
Trump's criticism of Biden's chip program sparks panic, raising fears of potential funding cuts.
news.summary: The recent criticism by the president towards a crucial aspect of the Biden administration's industrial policy has raised worries that there could be a potential reduction in its financial support.

news.headline: First vertically integrated gold tokenization project IPMB integrates gold & crypto for cost-efficient investing. GPRO & GEM NFTs offered.
news.summary: The article discusses how the International Precious Metals Bullion Group (IPMB) is offering a new approach to gold investing by combining blockchain technology with the gold industry. IPMB offers a gold-backed token (GPRO) and gold-backed NFTs (GEM) that provide transparency and favorable pricing for investors. The company's in-house solution, Goldtrace360, aims to automate the gold production tracking process. GEM NFTs are digital ownership titles for gold bars on the Polygon blockchain, obtained by staking GPRO tokens. Users can redeem older GEM NFTs for physical gold, and there are no fees associated with redemption for NFTs over 100 grams in denomination. The article emphasizes the need for transparency and sustainability in the gold supply chain and warns investors to conduct their own research before making investment decisions. IPMB's solution aims to streamline the gold investment process and eliminate unnecessary intermediaries, providing a cost-efficient and reliable option for investors interested in gold.

Strategy Inc. plans to raise $21 billion through preferred stock offering for Bitcoin acquisition.
news.summary: Strategy Inc. (NASDAQ:MSTR) recently announced plans to offer up to $21 billion in preferred stock to fund Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) purchases. The sales agreement includes issuing 8.00% Series A perpetual strike preferred stock STRK with a par value of $0.001 per share, convertible into Strategy's class A common stock. The proceeds will mainly be used for Bitcoin acquisitions, with some funds reserved for working capital and general corporate needs. This offering is structured as an at-the-market (ATM) program, enabling Strategy to sell shares as needed.

news.headline: Trump's executive order dashes XRP's hopes for inclusion in U.S. strategic crypto reserve after promising start; XRP surged 36% initially.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency community was taken aback as an executive order from President Donald Trump shattered the hopes of Ripple and its backers. Despite investing millions in political contributions to advocate for XRP's inclusion in a U.S. sovereign crypto reserve, the company faced disappointment as Trump reversed his initial stance. "Crypto Czar" David Sacks shared the news, revealing that XRP would not be part of any strategic reserve as promised. Trump's announcement on March 2 had caused XRP's price to surge by 36% within an hour, but the actual executive order unveiled a different reality. Instead of being recognized as a prized reserve asset, XRP was labeled a "Stockpile Asset," signifying a significant setback for the cryptocurrency.

news.headline: BlackRock's Rieder reports a move to fixed income investments.
Inventor from Escondido, Calif. invented SOUL TAKER card game as immersive alternative, released on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On March 10, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Escondido, Calif., shared the creation of the SOUL TAKER, an innovative game that aims to revolutionize traditional battle-style card games. The inventor, who is a game developer, designed the game to offer players a more immersive and engaging experience. The SOUL TAKER provides a fun and entertaining alternative in the gaming world, with unique features and gameplay that sets it apart from existing options. This new invention has garnered attention for its ability to captivate players and offer a fresh perspective on the gaming industry.

news.headline: Protagonist Therapeutics' stock rose on Monday after positive ANTHEM-UC Phase 2b study results for icotrokinra. Key numbers: response rate of 63.5%, clinical remission rate of 30.2%.
news.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:PTGX) recently disclosed the topline findings from the ANTHEM-UC Phase 2b trial of icotrokinra (JNJ-2113) for adults with moderately to severely active ulcerative colitis. The study, led by Protagonist's partner Johnson & Johnson, successfully achieved its primary objective of clinical response across all icotrokinra dose groups analyzed. Notably, the trial exhibited significant discrepancies compared to placebo in crucial secondary endpoints such as clinical remission, symptomatic remission, and endoscopic improvement by Week 12. All three daily doses of icotrokinra met the primary endpoint of clinical response at Week 12, with the highest dose group recording a response rate of 63.5% versus 27.0% for placebo. Furthermore, 30.2% of patients on the highest icotrokinra dosage demonstrated clinical remission at Week 12, in contrast to 11.1% in the placebo cohort. The rates of clinical remission and response were sustained... Check out the full article on Benzinga.com for further details.

news.headline: Bitcoin falls below $80K as Solana, Dogecoin, and stocks plummet due to inflation concerns and reactions to Trump's recession comments.
news.summary: On Monday, both cryptocurrency prices and stocks are experiencing a decline. Bitcoin, in particular, is plunging as traders respond to President Trump's remarks about a recession. This has led to a significant drop in market values worldwide. The situation is fluid, and investors are closely monitoring the developments. The impact of Trump's comments is evident in the current state of the market, with Bitcoin's value showing a sharp decrease. This has created a sense of uncertainty among traders and investors as they navigate through the fluctuations in the financial landscape.

news.headline: Trump addresses questions on possible recession, hints at changes for economy in "period of transition" amidst tariffs and job cuts.
news.summary: During a recent Fox News interview, President Donald Trump avoided directly addressing questions regarding a potential recession. While conversing with reporters on Air Force One, he refused to entertain the idea of an economic downturn. However, Trump did hint at the likelihood of a recession in 2025, attributing it to a transitional phase where his administration is enacting significant economic changes like tariffs and reducing the federal workforce. When pressed about the possibility of a recession during his Fox News appearance, Trump expressed reluctance to make predictions, stating, “I hate to predict things like that.” He highlighted that his economic policies are geared towards boosting wealth in the country, even though they may necessitate time for full effect. For more insights, the full article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
